name: Fudgy Flourless Chocolate Cake
recipeInstructions:
Preparation time: 30 minutes. Baking time: 60 to 70 minutes. Chilling time: Several hours or overnight.
1. Generously coat an 8-inch round cake pan, 3 inches deep (or springform pan) using 1 tablespoon of the butter. Dust the pan with flour and refrigerate until needed.
2. Place chocolate and the remaining 6 tablespoons butter into the top of a double boiler set over simmering water. Cook and stir until well mixed and melted.
3. In a small bowl, mix egg yolks. Add a little of the warm chocolate mixture and stir well. Scrape this mixture into the remaining chocolate and stir well; then set aside in a warm place, uncovered.
4. Preheat the oven to 250 degrees. Beat egg whites and salt in a large mixing bowl until soft peaks form. Gradually beat in sugar, 1 teaspoon at a time, until stiff and glossy but not dry.
5. Gently fold the chocolate mixture into the beaten egg whites; stir thoroughly. Spoon the batter into the prepared pan.
6. Bake until the center is set but still wiggles (about 50 to 60 minutes). Cool on wire racks for 10 minutes. As it begins to cool, the cake will pull away from the side of the pan. If using a springform pan, carefully remove the sides. Invert the cake onto a serving plate if using an ordinary cake pan; allow it to cool completely.
7. Refrigerate until cold. Cut the cake into wedges and serve each wedge topped with a large dollop of whipped cream.
